{{Quote|I've been to Nauton IV, where Master Ruati was ''beheaded'' by an unknown assassin…|Obi-Wan Kenobi, on Ruati's death|<ref name="SWO">[[Obsession 1|''Obsession'' 1]]</ref>}}
'''Nauton IV''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Nauton system/Legends|Nauton system]] of the [[Taldot sector/Legends|Taldot sector]] in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]].<ref name="TEAOC" /> In [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]],<ref name="TCC">''[[Star Wars: The Comics Companion]]''</ref> [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Ruati]] was [[Death/Legends|beheaded]] by an [[Assassin/Legends|assassin]] on Nauton IV, and fellow [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] suspected the [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Asajj Ventress/Legends|Asajj Ventress]] to be the murderer.<ref name="SWO" />

==Behind the scenes==
Nauton IV was first mentioned in [[Obsession 1|''Obsession'' 1]], the first issue of the ''[[Star Wars: Obsession]]'' [[Star Wars comic books|comic series]], written by [[W. Haden Blackman]] released on [[November 24]], [[2004]] by [[Dark Horse Comics]]. In [[2008]], the world received an entry in ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''.
